text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. One of its main goals is text understanding, where computers analyse the meaning of sentences, not just individual words. This technology is used in translation tools, like Google Translate, to convert text from one language to another accurately. Another important application is sentiment analysis, which determines whether a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings. Businesses often use this to understand customer opinions. Finally, chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with people, answering questions and providing help in a natural way, making communication between humans and machines easier.
